themes.exampleQuote: Gibson was very enthusiastic, boosted my mood up real quick, makes you really get in the mood for some good ice cream.
Buckeye had no flavor, the s'mores had no marshmallow, no Graham cracker — all of it was basically flavorless.
It was nice to stop in for non-dairy options.
I had $100 cash on me and the girl said she's not allowed to take it — that's a very interesting policy.
Each step across the bathroom floor my feet stuck — looks like it hasn't been cleaned in a month.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers frequently praise individual staff members by name for their warmth and energy, but opinions on the ice cream itself are polarized — standout flavors like cranberry crumble impress some while others find the homemade offerings bland and overpriced, with cleanliness and a no-cash policy adding friction.
notable_quote: Loved the cranberry crumble and the strawberry jam flavors. Waffle cone was amazing too.
